scripts.deploy:web: npm run build:web && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.eas:build:preview: npm run prepare:eas && eas build --platform android --profile preview --non-interactive
scripts.eas:build:production: npm run prepare:eas && eas build --platform android --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.check:env: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const envPath=path.join(process.cwd(), '.env'); if(!fs.existsSync(envPath)){console.error('.env file not found.'); process.exit(1);} const raw=fs.readFileSync(envPath,'utf8'); const data={}; raw.split(/\r?\n/).forEach(line=>{const t=line.trim(); if(!t||t.startsWith('#')) return; const i=t.indexOf('='); if(i===-1) return; const k=t.slice(0,i).trim(); const v=t.slice(i+1).trim(); data[k]=v;}); const keys=['EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY','EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN','EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID','EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET','EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID','EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID']; const missing=keys.filter(k=>!data[k]); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing env keys: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('All required Firebase env keys are present in .env.');"
scripts.check:all: npm run check:expo && npm run check:audit && npm run check:env && npm run check:web-build
